info.title: Plug Agente Socket RPC
info.description: OpenRPC document for the Plug JSON-RPC profile over Socket.IO. Application events are transported only inside PayloadFrame envelopes after agent:capabilities negotiation; requests sent earlier are rejected with invalid_request / protocol_not_ready. sql.execute results include effective_max_rows when applicable, and managed pagination requires an explicit ORDER BY for both page/page_size and cursor flows; generated SQL shape still depends on DB dialect (SQL Server OFFSET/FETCH, SQL Anywhere TOP/START AT, PostgreSQL LIMIT/OFFSET). Inbound JSON-RPC requests may include optional meta.outbound_compression (none | gzip | auto) to influence agent→hub PayloadFrame compression for that call and matching rpc:chunk / rpc:complete; see docs/communication/socket_communication_standard.md.

servers.name: socketio-hub
servers.summary: Logical Socket.IO transport negotiated during agent registration

methods.name: sql.execute
methods.summary: Execute a SQL statement, optionally returning multiple result sets

methods.name: sql.executeBatch
methods.summary: Execute multiple SQL statements in a batch with optional per-command execution order

methods.name: sql.cancel
methods.summary: Cancel an in-flight streaming SQL execution

methods.name: rpc.discover
methods.summary: Return the published OpenRPC contract for the active Plug profile
